keywords.name: displacement
keywords.description: Reset all relative displacements (shear and normal) of contacts to zero. This has no effect on the model results, and is useful for identifying effects of incremental changes.

keywords.name: energy
keywords.description: Reset joint energy terms to zero.

keywords.name: pore-pressure
keywords.description: Reset joint pore pressure to zero.

keywords.name: state
keywords.description: Reset all subcontact state indicators to elastic (no failure).

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: Reset all joint stresses (shear and normal) to zero.
